sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds: Battle Born Pond, Davis Creek Pond, Idlewild Ponds, Marilyn's Pond, Paradise Ponds, Rancho San Rafael Pond, Sparks Marina Pond, Verdi Pond, Virginia Lake and Wilson Common. Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours parks are open to public use.

sources.title: Verdi Pond — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Look for US Fish and Wildlife to stock the Lahontan cutthroat trout again this fall. Green Sunfish fishing has been great with the warmer temperatures. Stocking table (selected rows, all recorded as "Cutthroat Trout"): 1499 Cutthroat Trout, 9.0 in, 04-14-2026; 1500 Cutthroat Trout, 9.8 in, 04-09-2026; 1499 Cutthroat Trout, 9.1 in, 04-07-2026.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Verdi Pond is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated for Verdi Pond in NDOW's current regulation table; the limit applies to the combined daily/possession total across all game fish species, notwithstanding that the trout stocked here are Lahontan cutthroat trout (a native, ESA-listed subspecies stocked by US Fish and Wildlife) rather than rainbow trout.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds (incl. Verdi Pond)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Verdi Pond.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours for Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds generically as 'hours parks are open to public use'; no fixed clock times or sunrise/sunset offsets are specified for Verdi Pond.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing at Verdi Pond is allowed during the hours the park is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours parks are open to public use

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older; no water-specific permit exists for Verdi Pond.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older at Verdi Pond; no license is required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
